description: Lock the corrected chronology and causal boundaries for Paracelsian iatrochemistry, marine insurance, early modern medical casebooks, comparative trials, probability, and biology.

checks.reason: A generalized scientific-method category must not be projected backward as a prerequisite for Paracelsian chemical medicine.
The documented practical alchemical lineage remains the enabling capability for the scoped chemical-medicine program.
The chronology remains anchored to the decade of Paracelsus's mature chemical-medicine work.
The later-scoped Banking node must not replace the specific notarial mechanism behind the first Genoese policies.
Joint-stock companies postdate the first standalone marine policies and must remain downstream rather than causal ancestors.
Formal actuarial mathematics belongs to a later pricing node, not the first standalone policy milestone.
Ancient written codes are too remote and broad once medieval notarial contracts carry the documented legal capability.
Sea loans and commenda remain the contractual risk-sharing lineage before standalone premium insurance.
Medieval notarial drafting remains the direct documentary capability for the early policy market.
The node remains anchored to the first known Genoese policy dated 18 March 1343.
Anatomical atlases must not be conflated with the serial consultation-record form represented by casebooks.
The Forman-Napier anchor archive was not contingent on licensed university physician training.
Hippocratic written case histories remain the documentary predecessor to early modern serial casebooks.
Paper notebooks remain the material medium for the surviving serial archive.
The node remains anchored to the beginning of Simon Forman's surviving casebook run.
A controlled-comparison milestone dated 1747 cannot enable the graph's pharmacology practice anchored around 1600.
The 1654 mathematical-probability lineage must not depend on a later 1747 controlled-trial design.
Comparative trials retain their general experimental-method context without becoming ancestors of earlier technologies.
The controlled-comparison scope remains anchored to Lind's six-treatment scurvy trial.
The unified named field remains anchored to Lamarck and Treviranus in 1802 rather than earlier organism study.
